spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates three clear distinct hint strategies (self, blank, nohint) and their matching properties.

interactive.rationale: Users can click to trigger individual rows or run all simulations at once, updating total hit/miss tallies and the overall waste rate metrics.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Highlights why hint mismatch is incredibly costly.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes visual transitions and resets parameters cleanly.

references.rationale: Includes ChromeStatus feature entries and relative developers guidance pages.

design_system.rationale: Excellent layout columns and color tags matching standard design expectations.

summary: Incredible telemetry-like presentation demonstrating prerendering efficiency metrics and error rate percentages.
